case_title: PEDRUCO, DEBORAH A vs. XAVIER, CHRISTOPHER H

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-18-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-17-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-21-1994 CONTINUED FROM FEB-17-1994 TO MAR-21-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-21-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL SANCTIONS $100.00 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 4/20/94., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-20-1994 CONTINUED FROM MAR-21-1994 TO APR-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-20-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-20-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEDRUCO, DEBORAH A AS TO DEFENDANT XAVIER, CHRISTOPHER H SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-18-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-16-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-29-1993
